title: Taupe Plastic 32cm Circular Round Cleaning Washing up Bowl Basin
features: Generous Size: Measures 32 cm in diameter, providing ample space for washing and cleaning tasks
Stylish Design: Features a round shape and a creamy beige color that complements any kitchen decor
Durable Material: Crafted from high-quality plastic for long-lasting use and easy maintenance
Versatile Use: Ideal for washing fruits and vegetables, soaking dishes, or even as a serving bowl for parties
Easy to Clean: The smooth, non-porous surface prevents bacteria buildup and makes cleaning a breeze
description: Introducing our high-quality, 32cm circular, round Taupe Plastic Bowl, perfect for your cleaning and washing needs. Crafted from durable Plastic, this Bowl is not only functional but also stylish, adding a touch of elegance to your kitchen countertop. With its generous size, it's ideal for various tasks, from washing fruits and vegetables to soaking dishes. The Bowl's round shape and creamy Taupe color make it a versatile addition to any kitchen decor. Easy to clean and maintain, this Bowl is a practical and attractive choice for your home.
